case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. FLORENCIA CHAVEZ SILVERIO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERIO, FLORENCIA CHAVEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-26-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BERNICE MEDINA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT FLORENCIA CHAVEZ SILVERIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS - SUB-SERVED ON FIRST ATTEMPT TO SOPHIA BAUGHMAN (FRONT DESK). SERVED OCT-03-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERIO, FLORENCIA CHAVEZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED OCT-03-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERIO, FLORENCIA CHAVEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVERIO, FLORENCIA CHAVEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
